dialog.title: Manage cookie preferences
dialog.heading: Your Privacy Choices
dialog.description: In this panel you can review and change your cookie preferences at any time. Turn optional categories off if you do not want us to use them, or choose essential only to keep strictly necessary cookies enabled.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable personalized features and functionality.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
